_comment: Editing fixture template. Copy to tests/fixtures/<script>/editing.json.
_instructions: Set contractVersion to the current SCRIPT_EDITING_POLICY_CONTRACT_VERSION (1).
is a locked reference test. Once committed, changes require a documented justification.
Offsets are UTF-16 code unit indices (same as JavaScript string .length).
Use \uXXXX escapes for non-ASCII characters in JSON 'text' fields.
For non-BMP code points use surrogate pairs: U+10000 = '\uD800\uDC00'.
